title: Contact | David Smith MP
text_excerpt: Contact | David Smith MP Skip to content Search for: Search Search Join my Newsletter Join my Newsletter Casework & Support Home About Me My Work Surgeries News Contact Search for: Search Search Contact Me My team and I are here to help you. Please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact Details Email david.smith.mp @parliament.uk Email is the best way to get in touch for general queries. If you have a practical problem I’ll respond as soon as possible. Otherwise you can expect a reply in 28 days. Phone 01670 704 099 My team will answer calls from 09:00 – 17:00 Monday to Friday if they’re in the office. Otherwise please leave a voicemail and they’ll get back to you within 24 hours. Letter House of Commons Westminster, London SW1A 0AA I really appreciate reading letters from constituents, especially on more complex and emotive issues. Schools and groups are also welcome to send me letters – I will try my best to reply to them all! Visits Meeting constituents is one of the privileges of my job. I always enjoy opportunities to visit local organisations or host conversations in my office. Please email me at david.smith.mp@parliament.uk if you’d like to arrange a visit or a surgery appointment. You can also find out more about my upcoming casework surgeries below. Alternatively I can organise online calls (on Microsoft Teams) if this is better for you. I also host some surgeries online. For security reasons you must have an appointment to visit me in my office. No event found! My Offices. Our beautiful constituency is the third largest in England, so I’ve secured the funding for two local offices – one in Berwick, and one in Morpeth. You can see their addresses and locations here.
